patch.value: CONTEXT: pm-cli is a universal, agent-optimized, git-native project management CLI. DECISION: The product north star is 'project management = context management' — pm ships PM primitives via the pm SDK so any project can fully customize and optimize it; the tracker is the durable, shared context store for humans and coding agents across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and bare CLI. CONSEQUENCES: features are judged by whether they make project context more complete, organized, and discoverable; agent-ergonomics and determinism are first-class; the tracker must be a LIVING map (forward backlog + decisions), not only a completed-work log. EVIDENCE: README.md, AGENTS.md, PRD.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md; this audit (pm-w7f2) seeded the forward layer.
ADR: Product vision & guiding principle — project management = context management
Product vision & guiding principle — project management = context management
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
The ADR captures a durable architecture or operating decision with context, consequences, and evidence for future agents.
The closed Decision 'ADR: Product vision & guiding principle — project management = context management' is recorded under the ADR living log and preserved as durable project context.
